name: font_size_smaller_forward

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.17 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] 文字サイズ変更 forward-reference ［＃「X」はN段階小さな文字］ (https://www.aozora.gr.jp/annotation/etc.html) shrinks a run by N stages. Per §7.5 it consumes the preceding target literal 乙 and yields an emphasis node; §8 renders <span class="aozora-font-smaller" data-steps="N">. Offsets computed from the §3 byte model; cross-checked against the reference processor. New family.

source: 乙［＃「乙」は1段階小さな文字］

expected.serialize: 乙［＃「乙」は1段階小さな文字］
